payload.answer: Sam no longer works at Goldman; Sam now works at Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same Sam as the existing memory.

details: Classified the new information as superseding the existing employment memory.

repair_options: Mark the prior memory 'Sam works at Goldman' as superseded rather than deleting it.
